title: Fortuitous Feasts
body:
## Fortuitous Feasts

A large, compat-friendly food mod that adds over 40+ new crops and tons of new meals. Grow unique crops & fruit trees and make an array of new food, desserts, and drinks for you and your friends!

New food/ drink types include pies, wraps, pasta, pastries, sodas, donuts, jams, wine, tea, and much more!



Need to report a bug, or just want to chat about Fortuitous Feasts? Here’s our Discord! https://discord.gg/jbjMCEMA4g




### How to Get Started


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Notice:**
As of Update 1.2, crops can now spawn in the wild!

Their spawn rate can be changed in the config.



While wandering around the world, you’ll find a large array of wild berries, fruit trees, and herbs. Make sure to pick the berries, as you’ll need them for the next step! Once you have a few wild berries, which spawn in forest and plains biomes, you can craft a Feasts Farmer Crop Barrel. You’ll need at least three of any crop and a barrel to craft it! Place your barrel next to any unemployed Villager to turn them into a Feasts Farmer. You’ll get two beginning trades.

*Any 4 wild berries = 2 Crop Coins



Once you trade your berries for crop coins, you should unlock the next level, which means you can now trade for Veggie and Fruit Crop Bags. These bags can be traded for and then placed on the ground and broken again. When broken, the bags will drop 1-3 of one type of crop randomly.

*6 Crop Coins = 1 Veggie or Fruit Crop Bag



Plant your new crops, and wait for them to grow! If you want, you can sell specific ones back to your Feasts Farmer. Every Feasts Farmer wants different crops!

*1 Crop = 2 Crop Coins

Once you have enough crop coins, you can trade them for things like Gold Ingots, Iron Ingots, Diamonds, and Emeralds if your Feasts Farmer is high enough level.

</details>

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
